creator: mckusick@FreeBSD.org
text: This problem was fixed not long after this bug report was filed (though I was unaware of the bug report until now so did not close it). The fix is to open the snapshot and then unlink it immediately after it is created. Since the snapshot will have no references it will be removed when fsck closes the file and/or exits. If the system crashes prior to fsck exiting then the next run of fsck will find the unreferenced snapshot and remove it.
